quests.question: Convert to reported speech: He said, "I am ready."
options: He said that he was ready.
He said that he is ready.
He said that I was ready.
quests.hint: Remember to shift the tense backward (e.g., 'am' becomes 'was').
quests.explanation: In reported speech, we usually move the tense one step back into the past.
